prompt:
Using the provided reference image, create an ultra-realistic futuristic fashion editorial portrait of a stylish young woman standing in vibrant neon lighting. She wears an oversized crisp white shirt with minimalist luxury styling, reflective pastel holographic sunglasses with pink-orange gradient lenses, silver geometric hoop earrings, and a delicate gold chain necklace.

She has sleek shoulder-length dark brown hair, flawless glowing skin, soft glossy lips, subtle modern makeup, and a confident elevated expression while looking upward. 1744x2336

Background features dreamy pink and yellow gradient lighting with glowing vertical neon light strips, creating a futuristic synthwave aesthetic. Soft cinematic lighting wraps around the face with vibrant reflections on the sunglasses.

Luxury fashion campaign photography, modern Gen-Z editorial vibe, Vogue Korea inspired, hyper-realistic skin detail, ultra-detailed fabric textures, cinematic color grading, soft depth of field, sharp focus, clean composition, photorealistic, 85mm lens, dreamy neon atmosphere, 8k ultra realistic.
